message:
test(core): add DDL/upsert, GROUP BY complex expression conformance probes

Two new oracle test batches:
- CREATE TABLE AS SELECT, INSERT OR IGNORE/REPLACE, ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN
- GROUP BY with substr/CASE expressions, multi-column aggregates, HAVING
  on different aggregate, GROUP_CONCAT, COUNT(DISTINCT expr)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
